prerequisites: A Marketstack account, created at https://marketstack.com/signup (a free tier is available).
A Marketstack API access key, generated in your account dashboard after signup, used to populate the required api_key field.
A start_date value (the earliest date from which to retrieve end-of-day data), used to populate the required start_date field.

authMethods.name: API access key
authMethods.summary: Marketstack authenticates every request with a single unique access key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. The key is generated in your Marketstack account dashboard and is passed to the API as the access_key query parameter. All requests are secured with 256-bit HTTPS encryption on both free and paid plans.

setupSteps.title: Create a Marketstack account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at https://marketstack.com/signup. A free plan is available and includes end-of-day data access.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your API access key
setupSteps.body: Open your Marketstack account dashboard. Your unique API access key is generated there. Copy it and, if needed, reset it from the account section. Keep it secret.

setupSteps.title: Provide the access key
setupSteps.body: Enter the access key into the required api_key field. Marketstack appends this value to each request as the access_key query parameter to authenticate.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Enter a value in the required start_date field to define the earliest date from which end-of-day stock data is retrieved. This maps to the API's date_from parameter on the eod endpoint.
